infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Your location is used for driver navigation and delivery guidance in Albania.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Camera access is used to take your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Photo library access is used to select your profile photo.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Photo library access is used to save your profile photo.
